1.title: Welcome to Jumanji!

info.brief_description: An game for those who seek to find a way to leave their world behind.
info.description:
Welcome To Jumanji!
A game for those who seek to find a way to leave their world behind.

Your Original Character ( OC ) stumbles on a chest and opens it up to discover a board game titled: Jumanji.
He or She rolls the dice to move your token.
Doubles gets another turn and the first to reach the end wins.

BUT, BEWARE:
DO NOT BEGIN UNLESS YOU INTEND TO FINISH
THE CONSEQUENCES OF
THE GAME WILL VANISH ONLY WHEN
A PLAYER HAS REACHED JUMANJI AND CALLED OUT IT'S NAME ”

JUMANJI
GIVES A CLUE
TO HELP PLAYERS
COMPLETE
THEIR TURN ''”

Rules:
1.Jumanji hates any kind of cheater and anyone who does will be punished with scary consequences rather than moving your token back.
2. Jumanji brings it's dangers to your world.
3. Animals are not the only dangers of the game.
There are deadly and dangerous flora. There is also dangerous people like Van pelt and His Son: Russel Van Pelt and Warriors like The Manji Tribe and Jumanji's own Amazon warriors.
4. Conquer Jumanji or Jumanji will conquer you and your surroundings.
